summary.en: Trust Center, editorial system, tool quality signals, AI discoverability, and expanded search.
summary.es: Centro de confianza, sistema editorial, señales de calidad de herramientas, visibilidad para IA y búsqueda ampliada.
summary.fr: Centre de confiance, système éditorial, signaux de qualité des outils, découvrabilité par l'IA et recherche étendue.
summary.de: Trust Center, redaktionelles System, Tool-Qualitätssignale, KI-Auffindbarkeit und erweiterte Suche.
summary.pt: Central de confiança, sistema editorial, sinais de qualidade de ferramentas, descobribilidade por IA e pesquisa expandida.

added: Editorial system with 7 editorial pages at /en/editorial/*
Tool quality badges (Browser First, Privacy Friendly, Batch Supported, etc.)
Compatibility tables on every tool page
Performance metrics section on every tool page
Site statistics auto-generated at build time
Expanded related content (collections + landing pages + newest + popular)
improved: Search now indexes Trust, Editorial, Changelog, and Landing pages
Footer expanded with Knowledge Hub, Trust, Editorial, and Changelog links
Every article/guide/comparison/glossary page now displays Last Updated, Reviewed By, Version, and Reading Time
Build validation now catches orphan pages, duplicate canonicals, empty collections, and missing metadata
security: HSTS headers verified across all routes
performance: Build time maintained under 5 seconds for 800+ pages

summary.en: Tool collections, programmatic landing pages, FAQ hub, and massive internal linking expansion.
summary.es: Colecciones de herramientas, páginas de destino programáticas, hub de preguntas frecuentes y expansión masiva de enlaces internos.
summary.fr: Collections d'outils, pages de destination programmatiques, hub FAQ et expansion massive des liens internes.
summary.de: Tool-Sammlungen, programmatische Landing Pages, FAQ-Hub und massive Ausbau interner Verlinkungen.
summary.pt: Coleções de ferramentas, páginas de destino programáticas, hub de FAQ e expansão massiva de links internos.

added: Related guides, comparisons, and glossary terms on every tool page
improved: Internal linker now returns structured {relatedTools, guides, comparisons, glossary} per route
sitemap.xml updated with all new page types

summary.en: Developer tools suite: 43 new browser-based developer utilities.
summary.es: Suite de herramientas para desarrolladores: 43 nuevas utilidades de desarrollador basadas en navegador.
summary.fr: Suite d'outils développeur : 43 nouveaux utilitaires développeur basés sur navigateur.
summary.pt: Suite de ferramentas para desenvolvedores: 43 novos utilitários de desenvolvedor baseados em navegador.

added: 43 developer tools (JSON, Base64, URL, JWT, regex, hashing, UUID, etc.)

summary.en: Knowledge Hub: guides, comparisons, and glossary across 5 languages.
summary.es: Centro de conocimiento: guías, comparaciones y glosario en 5 idiomas.
summary.fr: Knowledge Hub : guides, comparaisons et glossaire en 5 langues.
summary.de: Knowledge Hub: Leitfäden, Vergleiche und Glossar in 5 Sprachen.
summary.pt: Knowledge Hub: guias, comparações e glossário em 5 idiomas.

added: Guides index, compare index, and glossary index pages
